title: Create: Crafting!
description: Simple mod wich adds more recipes for your gameplay with create mod
body:
### Simple Create add-on for more crafts in your game!
**Some things can be removed in your minecraft version, all things bellow was made on 1.20.1
List of Crafts in 0.4.0 (Last version), with mods which compatable is bellow**\
**Create** (Nothing else needed):
- Netherite
  > Splashing (Soul Sand, <1%)\
  > Haunting (Diamond, 10%)\
  > Haunting (Diamond Block, 100%)
- Blaze Rods
  > Haunting (Sticks, 10%)
- Magma Cream
  > Haunting (Slime Ball, 50%)
- Glowstone
  > Haunting (Redstone, 50%)
- Soul Sand
  > Splashing (Soul Soil, 50%)
- Wither Skull without nether fortress
  > Haunting (Skeleton Skull, 50%)
- Kelp without sea
  > Splashing (Sand, 10%)
- Dead Corals
  > Smoking (Any Live Coral Type, 100%)
- Live Corals
  > Splashing (Any Dead Coral Type, 100%)

**Create: Nuclear**:
- Enriched Soul Soil
  > Enriching (Soul Soil, 5%)
- Dried Kelp
  > Enriching (Paper, 75%)

**Ad Astra** (Compat from **Ad Astra Recipes**):
- Every Plating Uncraft
  > Workbench (9 platings = 1 plate)
- Etrium things
  > Workbench\
  > Alloying (Diamond+Desh Ingot = 1 Etrium Ingot)
- Photovoltanic Vesnium Cell
  > Workbench
- Chiper things craft
  > Energizer\
  > Etrionic Capacitor\
  > Gravity Normalizer\
  > Photovoltanic Etrium (and Vesnium) Cell(s)

**Ad Astra** X **Create**:
- Every Plating Uncraft
  > Pressing (9 platings = 1 plate)
- Etrium Things
  > Etrium Plate (Pressing, 1 Etrium Ingot = 1 Etrium Plate)
- Splashing Planet's Sands
  > Moon Sand (Cheese - 25%, Ice Shard - 20%, Iron Nugget - 15%, Desh Nugget - 10%)\
  > Mars Sand (Ice Shard - 25%, Iron Nugget - 20%, Diamond - 15%, Ostrum Nugget - 10%)\
  > Venus Sand (Coal - 25%, Gold Nugget - 20%, Diamond - 15%, Calorite Nugget - 10%)
- Steel Craft
  > Haunting (1 Iron Ingot = 1 Steel Ingot)
- Miling Planet's Cobblestones
  > Moon Cobblestone (1 Moon Cobblestone = 1 Moon Sand)\
  > Mars Cobblestone (1 Mars Cobblestone = 1 Mars Sand)\
  > Venus Cobblestone (1 Venus Cobblestone = 1 Venus Sand)


### Custom Content List
- Advancements
  > Advancements for Ad Astra Recipes content (From Ad Astra Recipes ofc)\
  > Create: Nuclear (2 secret advancements)
- ModMenu compat
  > 3 Langs for Mod's ToolTip (russian, english, ukrainian)\
  > 3 Langs for Mod's Description (russian, english, ukrainian)
